LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DELTA DENTAL OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED A PRIMA FACIE CASE. EVEN IF HE HAD DONE SO, PLAINTIFF'S PROFFERED EVIDENCE OF PRETEXT DOES NOT CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HERBERT W. YANOWITZ, TEL. NO. 362-1365 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CLAUDIA J. CASTILLO AND ATTY. MARY L. GUILFOYLE OF THE MILLER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 464-4300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DELTA DENTAL.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT DELTA DENTAL OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED A PRIMA FACIE CASE. EVEN IF HE HAD DONE SO, PLAINTIFF'S PROFFERED EVIDENCE OF PRETEXT DOES NOT CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
